item.description:
My Hentai Fantasy [v0.16.1] [Naughty Capy]

Overview

еү§жғ…жҰӮиҰҒ
  • You just wake up without remembering anything, apparently, you’re living a dream life, but why does everything seem so odd? You are about to go to university and your father is one of the richest men alive, but the fact that you don’t remember anything after waking up makes you very uneasy, so you try to find answers.
  • But who knows, maybe the answers you’re looking for are not worth it… Or are they? I guess it’s better if you find out for yourself.

item.description:
New Family [v0.7.0] [King Peanut]

Overview

еү§жғ…жҰӮиҰҒ
  • The story begins with the main character, who lost their parents at a young age, being taken in by a new family. This new family, though not related by blood, is a small, close-knit community that relies on one another. As the main character lives and grows with them, they share in each otherвҖҷs lives and experiences. The unfolding relationships within this family and the events they encounter together form the central storylineвҖӢ

item.title: She Might Be A Cuckqueen еҘ№жҲ–и®ёжңүз»ҝеёҪзҷ–
item.description:
She Might Be A Cuckqueen [v2.0.0] [ziglo]

Overview

еү§жғ…жҰӮиҰҒ
  • She Might Be A Cuckqueen is a tightly-paced erotic comedy, about trying to figure out if your girlfriend likes it, or hates it, when you cheat on her. Or, perhaps both?
  • This is a short (<1 hour) kinetic novel, with a focus on pacing and dialogue.
  • It plays a bit more like a short Judd Apatow film, than it does like a standard AVN.
  • Imagine if Judd Apatow directed PorkyвҖҷs. And if PorkyвҖҷs was about cuckqueens, instead ofвҖҰ whatever PorkyвҖҷs was about.вҖӢ

item.title: Goddesses' Whim еҘізҘһзҡ„еҝғиЎҖжқҘжҪ®
item.description:
Goddesses’ Whim [v0.4.6c] [Ncrow]

Overview

еү§жғ…жҰӮиҰҒ
  • You, the protagonist of all this, with a big heart (and something else..) because of your past, are someone with a boring and lonely life. But one day, given by your personality to help others no matter what, you decide to give your life for another, which attracts the attention of a certain goddess. Now, with the opportunity to return to live in another world given by the capricious goddesses that you will meet on your way, you have the chance to start over. All goddesses seek not to be bored, and you will soon discover that some can be more capricious than others. What awaits you? What kind of people will you meet? And obviously, how many girls will be madly in love with you?вҖӢ

item.title: Harem of Ankhutep е®үеә“зү№жҷ®зҡ„еҗҺе®«
item.description:
Harem of Ankhutep [v0.3] [AhaNubis]

Overview

еү§жғ…жҰӮиҰҒ
  • Harem of Ankhutep is an adult visual novel set in a fantasy world inspired by Egyptian myths. It’s a passion project with a cast made of original characters I started making long before I started making the game. At the start of the game, you arrive in the great city of Ankhutep as an ordinary, hard working man, down on his luck. You lived your whole life in a small secluded village, but external circumstances forced you out into the larger world. In Ankhutep you will meet the Netari. They are beings shaped by their divine ancestry, a fusion of gods and men. Some of them have long, furred ears, some may have a mushroom cap on their head, others may be ten times the size of an ordinary human. Your journey is shaped by the connections you build and the legacy you leave, both in the world and in their hearts. In a world born from the primordial abyss of Nu, the line between mortal and divine is a thin one. You see this connection every time you look at the Netari… And as they look back at you. Contains explicit sexual content, death (dead ends) and cult activities. Features a diverse cast of monster girls, each with her own unique personality, ambitions, and desires. No NTR & no cheating. The game is in an active development stage. Please keep spreading the word, join our Discord and rate the game! Thanks to all the support I can continue developing the game full time! Every little bit helps and keeps me motivated! Thank you! Gameplay trailer

item.description:
Bunny Hero Works Part-Time [v0.1] [Bunify Studio]

Overview

еү§жғ…жҰӮиҰҒ
  • You died becaused you gooned too hard. Before ascending to heaven (or hell), a mysterious voice pulled you over. After seeing your potential, it decided to give you an enticing proposal.

You, the protagonist, will reincarnate in another world as the bunny hero, tasked with the mission to fuck as many girls as possible and conquer the world via SEX. Can you do that? I guess we are about to find out.вҖӢ

Overview

еү§жғ…жҰӮиҰҒ
  • Hate to break it to you, but you haven’t been accepted in any college your applied for. Bummer. But don’t worry! There’s this special pre-college program you found online, that happens to have only beautiful girls as students! But wait, the teacher is a pervert!?
еү§жғ…жҰӮиҰҒ
  • In Special Harem Class you play as an unexpected student in this pre-college program, and conspire with Claire, your pervert teacher, to get close to the other students. What girl will better catch your eye? And don’t forget to explore the town, everywhere you look there’s a beautiful sight waiting to be seen!

item.description:
Ethereal Ties [Holiday Special v1.0] [NevenVN]

Overview

еү§жғ…жҰӮиҰҒ
  • Navigate strange occurrences that disrupt your once-mundane existence. When an unexpected death sends you back in time, you discover the unique ability to reset the day through your own demise. Along the way, you’ll encounter intriguing characters, form relationships, and possibly even find romance, all while uncovering the hidden world of “Diviners”вҖ”individuals with extraordinary powers. You must learn to survive in a society determined to eradicate you. Prepare for a journey of suspense, mystery, and supernatural twists as you delve into the unknown.вҖӢ

item.title: Genesis Proyect еҲӣдё–и®ЎеҲ’
item.description:
Genesis Proyect [v0.2] [ArtoriasRey]

Overview

еү§жғ…жҰӮиҰҒ
  • Some time ago…Humans lived alongside demons and angels…beings from the deepest hell and others from the highest heavens….One day… it all ended A virus arrived in the world, unleashing chaos in many places It is the DRP disease (Primary Reproductive Dysfunction) Which was the cause of the world’s political, economic, and social collapseвҖӢ

item.title: Broken Dreams з ҙзўҺд№ӢжўҰ
item.description:
Broken Dreams [v0.5.1] [Biggering]

Overview

еү§жғ…жҰӮиҰҒ
  • вҖңYou wake up in your boring life as a psychologist, go to work like any other day at the university, finish your day and go to a bar, and in the blink of an eyeвҖҰ you are no longer you. Now, several girls go to your office looking for your help. You can no longer control your emotions and a beautiful girl starts visiting you in your dreams. Who is she? Why does your life begin to have no meaning? Who are you? Uncover the mysteries of your new life as you “help” various girls solve their personal problems and possibly find love. A story of romance, mystery, and personal growthвҖҰ Are you ready, Dreamer?вҖқвҖӢ

item.description:
After Dark [v0.25.2] [Bozavest]

Overview

еү§жғ…жҰӮиҰҒ
  • After Dark is a gripping visual novel that tells the story of a boy who hasnвҖҷt been able to sleep for over 10 years, haunted by the shadows of an event he canвҖҷt remember. Feeling disconnected from the world and struggling to forge meaningful connections, his life takes a sudden turn at the start of his final year of school. A chance encounter with a mysterious, mystical figure reveals that his destiny is far greater than he ever imagined.вҖӢ.

item.title: Lustful College жҳҘеҝғиҚЎжјҫеӯҰйҷў
item.description:
Lustful College [v0.45] [Tinkel Studios]

Overview

еү§жғ…жҰӮиҰҒ
  • Lustful College tells the story of a young man whose life spirals into depression after losing his parents at an early age. Just when everything seems lost, an unexpected letter from a prestigious college offers him a second chance. A life-changing journey filled with mystery, temptation, and unforgettable encounters. You will meet more than twenty unique characters with deep backstories, experience detailed and logical storytelling, uncover side charactersвҖҷ lives, and dive into a world full of action, drama, and secrets.вҖӢ

item.title: AIRevolution AIйқ©е‘Ҫ
item.description:
AIRevolution [v0.3.8] [Akaime]

Overview

еү§жғ…жҰӮиҰҒ
  • AIRevolution is a Visual Novel Game, sci-fi bathed with a shiny layer of fantasy. The world is crowded with Artificial intelligences, most of them looking like humans, they even managed to have the same rights as humans do in a ’near’ future. Will you accept them as equals or.. choose another path? You better decide fast, there is an AI Revolution incomming..

  • After ten long years of protecting her foster family from her little secret, a young futanari finally takes off her chastity belt upon entering high school, eager to explore her repressed degeneracy and satisfy all of her immoralities.

item.description:
Life’s Payback [v2.4] [Vinkawa]

Overview

еү§жғ…жҰӮиҰҒ
  • Life’s Payback is a game where you take your revenge on life. Everything was going well until an unprecedented economic crisis turned your daily routine upside down. You were living on your own but had to return to the family home against your will to excel at school, which is now the condition for your family to receive financial aid from the government. However, given the way you’ve been treated in the past, you decide that everything comes at a price…
